title: Oritechnical - Add on for Oritech
description: A Mod that Adds a few blocks that have similar art style with Oritech Mod
body:
This is my First Mod. I am still learning and using this mod to further my experience. 

THIS MOD ADDS A FEW DECORATIVE BLOCKS THAT LOOK SIMILAR TO THE ART STYLE OF ORITECH Mod by Rearth.

Currently there are 

4 "Panel" blocks

1 3D 'Panel' block

1 Oritech Style Ladder

1 Fence block

More to be added... 

YOU CAN USE THIS IN ANY MODPACK - Dvil
